title: Finance Dashboard
feeRemindersSubtitle: Configure automatic WhatsApp reminders for overdue fee payments. The system runs nightly and sends messages based on these rules.
remindersGracePeriod: Grace period: {days} days · Runs nightly via /api/cron/fee-reminders
assignBranchFeeStructure: Assign a branch to your profile to manage fee structures.
noFeeStructuresDesc: Define tuition and fee templates for your branch
noInvoicesDesc: Every day without invoices, parents can't see or pay balances—create fee structures and generate invoices
noPaymentsDesc: Record a manual payment against an open invoice
generatePayrollDesc: Create pending payroll entries for all staff in this period (skips duplicates).
addStaffHint: Add staff members in Operations to manage payroll.
noPayrollDesc: Generate payroll for a pay period or add individual entries
assignBranchExpenses: Assign a branch to your profile to record expenses.
noExpensesDesc: Track operational spending by category and date
noInvoiceChartData: No invoice data to chart yet.
currencyDescription: Choose the currency shown on fees, expenses, payroll, and parent payment screens. Defaults to US Dollars.
noSchoolLinkedDesc: Your account is not linked to a school yet.
